data.title: Global school uniform market set to reach $58.61 billion by 2031, growing at 6.1% CAGR fueled by IoT sensors in smart uniforms.
data.description: In a report released by The Insight Partners on September 12, 2025, the school uniform market is experiencing significant growth worldwide. This growth is mainly attributed to the incorporation of IoT sensors into eco-friendly materials, resulting in the development of smart uniforms that have monitoring capabilities. The global market for school uniforms has notably expanded, with key emphasis on sustainable fabrics. The trend towards smart uniforms has propelled market growth, reflecting the increasing demand for technologically advanced clothing.

data.title: Senate likely to confirm 1 new Fed board member before next week’s policy meeting. Another seat still undecided.
data.description: The Senate is ready to approve President Trump's nomination to the central bank in time for the upcoming policy meeting. However, the confirmation of another governor is still uncertain.

data.title: Tether announces 'US-regulated' USAT stablecoin for US market, led by Bo Hines, White House crypto group ex-director.
data.description: A new development in the world of cryptocurrency reveals that Tether's US Asset Token (USAT) will now be under the leadership of Bo Hines. Hines, who hails from Charlotte, North Carolina, previously served as the director of the White House's crypto working group. This announcement comes as a significant move in the industry, with Hines bringing valuable expertise and experience to his new role.

data.title: Toast and Bon Appétit partner for 2025 Best New Restaurants list, honoring top talent in hospitality industry.
data.description: In Boston, a new restaurant opening symbolizes bravery and love for the craft, a journey fraught with obstacles where attention to detail and dedication are vital for triumph. Toast, listed on NYSE as TOST, and Bon Appétit have collaborated to announce the prestigious 2025 Best New Restaurants list, highlighting promising culinary talent. This partnership underscores Toast's vow to champion emerging hospitality visionaries and entrepreneurs who are ready to take risks and excel in the industry.

data.title: Tezos (XTZ) price rises by 3.9% to $0.76, eyes key resistance level at $0.87 for potential breakout.
data.description: The price of XTZ has risen to $0.76 as technical indicators show bullish momentum. Tezos traders are closely watching the key resistance level at $0.87, which could influence the next significant movement.

data.title: UK trade groups call for inclusion of blockchain in joint US tech initiative; urge gov't to expand cooperation.
data.description: A group of trade organizations in the UK is calling on the government to incorporate blockchain technology and digital assets into its proposed "Tech Bridge" partnership with the United States. The coalition stresses the importance of including these innovative technologies in the collaboration to enhance cross-border cooperation and drive economic growth. This move seeks to leverage the potential benefits of blockchain and digital assets in the partnership to promote technological advancement and foster new business opportunities.

data.title: CobbleStone partners with uGuru to enhance contract automation and data management. Revolutionary impact on CLM.
data.description: Today, in Princeton, New Jersey on September 12, 2025, CobbleStone Software, a reputable company offering contract lifecycle management solutions, revealed a fresh partnership with uGuru Data Sciences, a top consultancy focusing on data-driven transformation. This collaboration signifies a significant step...

data.title: Global B2B Marketplace Platforms market projected to reach USD 1.08 billion by 2030, growing at 7.8% CAGR.
data.description: In Bangalore, India on September 12, 2025, it was reported that the market size of B2B Marketplace Platforms is expected to increase significantly. The global market for B2B Marketplace Platforms is forecasted to rise from its 2024 value of USD 688 million to USD 1079.7 million by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8% during the specified period.

data.title: Former crypto adviser Bo Hines will take over as CEO for Tether’s new US-regulated stablecoin, backed by the dollar. Joined Tether in April.
data.description: In April, a former White House cryptocurrency advisor made a move to Tether, a popular cryptocurrency. However, this individual is set to take on the role of CEO for a forthcoming stablecoin project by Tether. This stablecoin is expected to be US-regulated and backed by the dollar.

data.title: Pure Vita Labs debuts Can-Whey, Canada's first 100% Canadian-made protein powder in vanilla and chocolate. Available at Loblaws, Amazon.ca, and ca.pvl.com. Characters: 108
data.description: Pure Vita Labs (PVL), a long-standing Canadian expert in sports nutrition, has recently launched Can-Whey, the initial nationwide protein powder crafted solely from Canadian milk. This product can now be found at major retailers such as Loblaws, Amazon.ca, and ca.pvl.com. With almost three decades of experience in the industry, PVL aims to cater to consumers seeking high-quality sports nutrition products. The launch of Can-Whey signifies a significant milestone for the company and offers consumers a locally sourced protein option.

data.title: Visual Matrix sponsors Follow Money Fight Slavery Summit, tackling human trafficking in hospitality.
data.description: Visual Matrix has pledged its support as a Platinum Sponsor for the Follow Money Fight Slavery Summit taking place in Dallas. The summit aims to combat human trafficking within the hospitality industry. This sponsorship demonstrates the company's commitment to addressing this important issue.

data.title: Theratechnologies shareholders approve acquisition by Future Pak's affiliate CB Biotechnology, under Chapter XVI - Division II, Quebec.
data.description: In Montreal, on September 12, 2025, Theratechnologies Inc. ("Theratechnologies" or "the Company") announced that its shareholders have given the green light to the proposed plan of arrangement under Chapter XVI – Division II of the Business Corporations Act (Québec) with CB Biotechnology, LLC (the "Purchaser"), a subsidiary of Future Pak, LLC ("Future Pak"). Theratechnologies is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company trading on the TSX under TH and on the NASDAQ under THTX.

data.title: York Space Systems confirms all 21 satellites launched for SDA's Transport Layer Mission are healthy.
data.description: York Space Systems, located in Denver, has successfully made initial contact with and confirmed the good condition of all 21 satellites deployed for the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency's (DARPA) Tranche 1 Transport Layer Mission.

data.title: EigenLayer (EIGEN) jumps above $1.47 (+0.89%) after being listed on Binance and Coinbase. Bullish trend signals for September 30 transferability.
data.description: The price of EIGEN has surged to $1.47, registering a daily increase of 0.89% after being listed on Binance and Coinbase. Technical indicators suggest strong bullish signals, paving the way for potential gains leading up to the token transferability on September 30.
